items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Eric Garrison was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs

· Community Services Officer Trooper Gagliardi presents the Online Gaming Safety and Predators Program. It highlights predator tactics and empowers parents to better protect their children. Contact rogagliard@pa.gov for details or visit http:// bit.ly/CSO-PIO for all programs.

· May 18 Troopers brought Citizens’ Police Academy to Governor Mifflin High School in Berks County. Students learned about the tools and techniques used by PSP, including forensics and collision analysis. They toured the State Police Academy and learned about career opportunities.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 14 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: John Markle was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 14 Troopers Colon and Galasso joined the Philly Phanatic at Citizens Bank Park to remind drivers to buckle up during the “Click It or Ticket” press conference hosted by the Phillies and PennDOT. Buckle up. Every trip, every time.
